macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Meta hires four more OpenAI researchers, deepening AI talent war
items.summary: Meta reportedly hired Shengjia Zhao, Jiahui Yu, Shuchao Bi and Hongyu Ren from OpenAI, underscoring the intense competition among major AI labs for top researchers. The report also places the move in the context of broader AI industry rivalry and staffing churn.

items.title: OpenAI Academy launches enterprise AI courses
items.summary: OpenAI launched three new enterprise-focused AI courses aimed at turning access to AI tools into practical organizational capability. The announcement reflects continued demand for workforce training as companies try to deploy AI more effectively.

items.title: ChatGPT experiences reported outage
items.summary: Users reported that ChatGPT was down and having trouble loading prompts, indicating a service disruption affecting the widely used AI product. No cause or resolution was provided in the available report.

items.title: Apple to open up underlying AI technology to developers
items.summary: Apple is preparing to expose more of its underlying AI technology to third-party developers, a move that could expand the ecosystem around Apple Intelligence. The report suggests Apple is broadening access as it races to improve its AI platform.

items.title: SpaceX moves deeper into AI with $60 billion Cursor deal
items.summary: The Wall Street Journal reported that SpaceX is using a massive deal to buy the AI coding agent Cursor, part of a broader push to strengthen its AI capabilities and enterprise reach. The move signals continued consolidation between major technology firms and AI tooling providers.

items.title: Bankers prepare for OpenAI and Anthropic IPO scenarios
items.summary: According to the Wall Street Journal, Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are creating separate teams in anticipation of potential IPOs from OpenAI and Anthropic. The report highlights growing market expectations that leading AI labs could eventually go public.

items.title: Google builds out its own AI chip business
items.summary: The Wall Street Journal reported that Google is using a strategy similar to Nvidia’s to expand its AI chip business and win data-center customers. The development points to intensifying competition in AI infrastructure and semiconductor supply.

items.title: New arXiv papers focus on LLM safety, uncertainty, and mixture-of-experts
items.summary: Recent arXiv postings include work on safety-aligned LLMs, calibrated mixture-of-experts under distribution shift, uncertainty estimation for large language models, and evaluation methods for combinatorial counting. These papers show continued research momentum around model reliability and robustness.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
